title: Minegemia
description: The resource pack replaces the Totem of undying and the Carved pumpkin with Argemia Plush from Voices Of The Void
body:
The resource pack replaces the Totem of undying and the Сarved pumpkin with Argemia Plush from [Voices Of The Void](https://mrdrnose.itch.io/votv)

It is necessary to rename the item then the item will change the model

Names:
- Red Argemia (v1.0.0 - v1.0.1)
- Blue Argemia (v1.0.1)
- Green Argemia (v1.0.1)
- Cyan Argemia (v1.0.1)
- Yellow Argemia (v1.0.1)
- Pink Argemia (v1.0.1)
